title: David Ballester
text:
David Ballester

M.S. Business Analytics | B.S. Statistics
Research • Data Science • Machine Learning
I am a statistician and business analytics graduate with interests in research, machine learning, statistical modeling, and data driven decision making.
My work focuses on applying quantitative methods, programming, and modern data science techniques to answer meaningful research and business questions and solve real world problems.
Explore my research projects, technical work, and professional experience through the links above.
